mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.permission_name, p.permission_code, p.resource_type, p.parent_id, p.path, p.create_time, p.update_time, p.deleted FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} AND p.deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.id ASC

SELECT p.id, p.permission_name, p.permission_code, p.resource_type, p.parent_id, p.path, p.create_time, p.update_time, p.deleted FROM sys_permission p WHERE p.parent_id = 0 AND p.deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.id ASC

SELECT p.id, p.permission_name, p.permission_code, p.resource_type, p.parent_id, p.path, p.create_time, p.update_time, p.deleted FROM sys_permission p WHERE p.parent_id = #{parentId} AND p.deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.id ASC
